title: BM-240: Generic roadmap result sync for production tasks
commit_message: BM-240: add generic roadmap result sync
checks: python3 -c "import json; s=json.load(open('governance/state/roadmap_state.json')); assert any(t.get('task_id')=='PROD_INTERNAL_CONTOUR_BASELINE_STATE' and t.get('status')=='completed' for t in s.get('tasks', []))"
